stemHtml: A pilot is flying to an isolated airport and using the Predetermined point (PDP) procedure. Upon arriving at the predetermined point, the pilot can…

options.a: Fly to the alternate aerodrome first and then to the destination aerodrome.
options.b: Fly to the alternate aerodrome or back to the departure aerodrome.
options.c: Fly to the destination aerodrome or to the alternate aerodrome.
options.d: Fly to the destination aerodrome first and then to the alternate aerodrome.
